name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 contracts/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed renegotiation opportunities cause increased costs. We provide a contract management system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking contract terms and identifying renegotiation opportunities.
features: Notify contract manager of renegotiation opportunities

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking contract terms and identifying renegotiation opportunities.

must_have_features: Notify contract manager of renegotiation opportunities
